name: Legacy Pro & V2 Small Bamboo Case
summary: The AirVape Legacy Pro & V2 bamboo case offers a compact and stylish way to store your device and essentials.
description: The AirVape Legacy Pro & V2 bamboo case offers a compact and stylish way to store your device and essentials. Designed for convenience, it keeps your setup organised at home or on the go. Built with a durable bamboo exterior, it provides reliable protection while maintaining a clean, premium look. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
